name: Churu Bites Dog Treats - Chicken Recipe Wraps (with Cheese)
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wrapped with Chicken & Cheese Recipe are soft, pillow-shaped treats designed to delight even the most selective dogs. Each bite features a soft baked chicken paste exterior wrapped around a creamy Churu-style filling , delivering two irresistible textures in every mouthful. Made with high-quality, wholesome ingredients including farm-raised chicken and natural tuna, these treats contain no grains, preservatives, carrageenan, or artificial colours . With 72% moisture , they help support daily hydration while remaining light and easy to digest. Perfect for training, rewarding, or pill administration , these bite-sized treats are gentle on teeth and ideal for puppies, adult dogs, and seniors alike. Each serving is low in calories (approx. 16 kcal per pack) and enriched with Vitamin E to support immune health and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant benefits. Individually portioned packs keep treats fresh and make them convenient for on-the-go use , helping prevent messes while ensuring consistent portion control. Key Benefits Dual texture: soft chicken outside with creamy centre Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients Grain-free and free from artificial colours and preservatives 72% moisture to support hydration Low-calorie treat suitable for daily rewards Vitamin E for immune support Green tea extract provides antioxidant benefits Ideal for training, bonding, or hiding medication Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. This product is not intended to be fed as a meal. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water. For your pet’s health, consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Ingredients Chicken, Water, Tuna, Tapioca Starch, Egg White, Sodium Caseinate, Cheese (Milk, Water, Phosphoric Acid), Guar Gum, Natural Chicken Flavor, Yeast Extract, Vitamin E Supplement, Paprika Oleoresin (Colour), Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 22.00% Crude Fat (min): 3.00% Crude Fiber (max): 0.50% Moisture (max): 72.00% Vitamin E (min): 80 IU/kg Calorie Content 1300 kcal/kg 15.6 kcal per pack (ME)
